## File: `rules/default/security/cryptography/random.json`
```json
[
    {
        "name": "Do not use weak/non-cryptographic random number generators",
        "id": "DS148264",
        "description": "Use cryptographic random numbers generators for anything even close to a security function.",
        "recommendation": "Replacements depend on language.",
        "tags": [
            "Cryptography.PRNG.Weak"
        ],
        "applies_to": [
            "c",
            "cpp",
            "csharp",
            "python",
            "php",
            "java",
            "javascript",
            "typescript"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "important",
        "rule_info": "DS148264.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "pseudoRandomBytes",
                "type": "string",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "\\brand\\(",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "random_shuffle\\(",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "\\bshuffle\\(",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "RAND_MAX",
                "type": "string",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "\\brand\\(\\s*\\)\\s*%",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "mwc1616",
                "type": "string",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "System.Random",
                "type": "string",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "\\bRandom\\(",
                "type": "RegexWord",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "arc4random",
                "type": "string",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "$md5->add($$ , 500 , rand(500) );"
        ]
    },
    {
        "name": "Do not use weak/non-cryptographic random number generators",
        "id": "DS148264",
        "description": "Use cryptographic random numbers generators for anything even close to a security function.",
        "recommendation": "Use the Rust Rand crate.",
        "tags": [
            "Cryptography.PRNG.Weak"
        ],
        "applies_to": [
            "rust"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "important",
        "rule_info": "DS148264.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "seed_from_u64",
                "type": "string",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "fastrand",
                "type": "string",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "oorandom",
                "type": "string",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ]
    },
    {
        "name": "Do not use weak/non-cryptographic random number generators",
        "id": "DS148264",
        "description": "Use cryptographic random numbers generators for anything even close to a security function.",
        "recommendation": "Replacements depend on language.",
        "tags": [
            "Cryptography.PRNG.Weak"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "important",
        "rule_info": "DS148264.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "DUAL_EC_DRBG",
                "type": "string",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "(32969|18273)",
                "type": "RegexWord",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ]
    },
    {
        "name": "Do not seed randomness based on system time or a static value.",
        "id": "DS149435",
        "description": "Passing a predicable value to srand() is very insecure and should be avoided.",
        "recommendation": "",
        "tags": [
            "Cryptography.WeakRandomness"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "critical",
        "rule_info": "DS149435.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "\\bsrand\\(\\s*time\\(",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "\\bsrand\\(\\s*\\d+\\s*\\)",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "srand(time(NULL)) "
        ]
    }
]
```

## File: `rules/default/security/cryptography/underhanded.json`
```json
[
    {
        "name": "Source implementation of a weak/broken cryptography hash function",
        "id": "DS109733",
        "description": "An implementation of a weak/broken hash function was found in source code.",
        "recommendation": "Do not use MD5, and always prefer OS- or library-provided cryptography implementations.",
        "tags": [
            "Cryptography.HashAlgorithm.WeakOrBrokenImplementation"
        ],
        "confidence": "medium",
        "severity": "critical",
        "rule_info": "DS109733.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "242070db|02441453|db702024|53144402|3572445317",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ],
                "_comment": "MD5"
            },
            {
                "pattern": "98BADCFE|FEDCBC98|C3D2E1F0|F0E1D2C3",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ],
                "_comment": "SHA-1"
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "242070db",
            "02441453",
            "db702024",
            "53144402",
            "3572445317",
            "98BADCFE",
            "FEDCBC98",
            "C3D2E1F0",
            "F0E1D2C3"
        ]
    }
]
```

## File: `rules/default/security/cryptography/weak_cipher_modes.json`
```json
[
    {
        "name": "A weak cipher mode of operation was used",
        "id": "DS187371",
        "description": "A potentially weak cipher mode of operation was used.",
        "recommendation": "Consider using CBC, CTR, or GCM.",
        "tags": [
            "Cryptography.Symmetric.CipherMode.Weak"
        ],
        "confidence": "medium",
        "severity": "important",
        "rule_info": "DS182720.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "(ECB|OFB|CFB|CTS|PCBC|GMAC|XCBC|IACBC|IAPM|EAX|OCB|CWC|AEAD|LRW|XEX|XTS|CMC|EME|CBCMAC|OMAC|PMAC)",
                "type": "RegexWord",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "tdes.Mode = CipherMode.ECB;"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
        ]
    },
    {
        "name": "A weak cipher mode of operation was used",
        "id": "DS182720",
        "description": "A potentially weak cipher mode of operation was used.",
        "recommendation": "Consider using CBC, CTR, or GCM.",
        "applies_to": [
            "php"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Cryptography.Symmetric.CipherMode.Weak"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "important",
        "rule_info": "DS182720.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "MCRYPT_MODE_(ECB|CFB|OFB|NOFB|STREAM)",
                "type": "RegexWord",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "fix_its": [
            {
                "name": "Change cipher mode to CBC",
                "type": "RegexReplace",
                "replacement": "MCRYPT_MODE_CBC",
                "pattern": {
                    "pattern": "MCRYPT_MODE_(ECB|CFB|OFB|NOFB|STREAM)",
                    "type": "regex",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ],
                    "_comment": ""
                }
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "$output = mcrypt_encrypt(MCRYPT_BLOWFISH, $key, $data, MCRYPT_MODE_ECB, $iv);\n"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
        ]
    }
]
```

## File: `rules/default/security/frameworks/android.json`
```json
[
    {
        "name": "Android debug is enabled.",
        "id": "DS180000",
        "description": "The android:debuggable element is set to true, which should be disabled for release builds.",
        "recommendation": "Set android:debuggable to false for release builds.",
        "applies_to_file_regex": [
            "AndroidManifest.xml"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Framework.Android"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "ManualReview",
        "rule_info": "DS180000.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "xpaths": ["//default:application/@android:debuggable"],
	    	    "xpathnamespaces": {
                    "default": "http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0",
                    "android": "http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
                },
                "pattern": "true",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ],
                "modifiers" : ["i"]
            }
        ],
        "fix_its": [
            {
                "name": "Change to false",
                "type": "RegexReplace",
                "replacement": "false",
                "pattern": {
                    "pattern": "true",
                    "type": "regex",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ],
                    "_comment": ""
                }
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"utf-8\"?><manifest xmlns=\"http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0\" xmlns:android=\"http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android\"><application android:debuggable='true' /></manifest>"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
            "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"utf-8\"?><manifest xmlns=\"http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0\" xmlns:android=\"http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android\"><application android:debuggable='false' /></manifest>"
        ]
    },
	{
        "name": "Android debug is enabled.",
        "id": "DS180001",
        "description": "The setWebContentsDebuggingEnabled element is set to true, which should be disabled for release builds.",
        "recommendation": "Set setWebContentsDebuggingEnabled to false for release builds.",
        "applies_to": [
            "java"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Framework.Android"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "ManualReview",
        "rule_info": "DS180000.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "setWebContentsDebuggingEnabled\\(true\\)",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ],
                "modifiers" : ["i"]
            }
        ],
        "fix_its": [
            {
                "name": "Change to false",
                "type": "RegexReplace",
                "replacement": "false",
                "pattern": {
                    "pattern": "true",
                    "type": "regex",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ],
                    "_comment": ""
                }
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "setWebContentsDebuggingEnabled(true)"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
            "setWebContentsDebuggingEnabled(false)"
        ]
    },
	{
        "name": "Android StrictMode is enabled.",
        "id": "DS180002",
        "description": "StrictMode is detected, which is useful for developers but should be disabled for release builds.",
        "recommendation": "Disable StrictMode for release builds.",
        "applies_to": [
            "java"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Framework.Android"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "ManualReview",
        "rule_info": "DS180001.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "StrictMode.setThreadPolicy(",
                "type": "substring",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ],
                "modifiers" : ["i"]
            },
			{
                "pattern": "StrictMode.setVmPolicy(",
                "type": "substring",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ],
                "modifiers" : ["i"]
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "StrictMode.setThreadPolicy(new StrictMode.ThreadPolicy.Builder()",
			"StrictMode.setVmPolicy(new StrictMode.VmPolicy.Builder()"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
            "application(StrictMode)"
        ]
    }
]
```

## File: `rules/default/security/frameworks/aspnet5.json`
```json
[
    {
        "name": "All Controllers Should Derive From Controller.",
        "id": "DS184626",
        "description": "All Controllers Should Derive From Controller.",
        "recommendation": "Ensure this class derives from Controller.",
        "applies_to": [
            "csharp"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Implementation.Web.ASPNET.ControllerWithoutExtendingController"
        ],
        "confidence": "medium",
        "severity": "moderate",
        "rule_info": "DS184626.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "class [^\\s]+Controller\\s*:\\s*(?!.*?(Controller)).*",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            },
            {
                "pattern": "class [^\\s]+Controller[\\s{]*$",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "conditions" : [
            {
                "pattern" : 
                {
                    "pattern": "using System.Web",
                    "type": "regex",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ],
                    "_comment": "We only want to mark web controllers."
                },
                "negate_finding": false,
                "search_in": "only-before"
            }
        ],
        "fix_its": [
            {
                "name": "Change to inherit from Controller",
                "type": "RegexReplace",

                "replacement": "$1 : Controller",
                "pattern": {
                    "pattern": "(class [^\\s]+Controller)(([\\s{]*$)|(\\s*:\\s*(?!.*?(Controller)).*))",
                    "type": "regex",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ]
                }
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "using System.Web;\n class UserController : CustomObject"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
        ]
    }
]
```

## File: `rules/default/security/frameworks/dotnet_framework.json`
```json
[
    {
        "name": "Do not target .NET Framework versions less than 4.7.2.",
        "id": "DS450000",
        "description": "Do not target .NET Framework versions less than 4.7.2.",
        "recommendation": "",
        "applies_to": [
            "CSharp Project"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Framework.NET.Outdated"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "ManualReview",
        "rule_info": "DS450000.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "xpaths": ["//TargetFramework"],
                "pattern": "(net11|net20|net35|net40|net403|net45|net451|net452|net46|net461|net462|net47|net471)",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ],
                "modifiers" : ["i"]
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "<TargetFramework>net11</TargetFramework>"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
            "<TargetFramework>net999</TargetFramework>"
        ]
    },
    {
        "name": "Cookie Secure flag is disabled (.NET)",
        "id": "DS450001",
        "description": "Disabling the Secure flag could result in the disclosure of sensitive cookie information over HTTP.",
        "recommendation": "Enable the Secure cookie on cookies.",
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "important",
        "rule_info": "DS450001.md",
        "applies_to_file_regex": [
            ".*\\.config$"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Framework.NET"
        ],
        "patterns": [
            {
                "xpaths": ["//httpCookies/@requireSSL", "//forms/@requireSSL", "//roleManager/@cookieRequireSSL"],
                "pattern": "false",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ],
                "type": "regex"
            }
        ],
        "fix_its": [
            {
                "name": "Set to true",
                "replacement": "true",
                "type": "RegexReplace",
                "pattern": {
                    "pattern": "false",
                    "type": "substring",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ],
                    "modifiers": ["i"]
                }
                
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "<httpCookies requireSSL='false' />",
            "<forms requireSSL='false' />",
			"<roleManager cookieRequireSSL='false' />"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
            "<httpCookies requireSSL='true' />",
            "<forms requireSSL='true' />",
			"<roleManager cookieRequireSSL='true' />"
        ]
    },
	{
        "name": "Trace is enabled in system.web",
        "id": "DS450002",
        "description": "Having traces enabled could leak sensitive application information in production.",
        "recommendation": "Disable tracing before deploying to production.",
        "applies_to_file_regex": [
            ".*\\.config$"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Framework.NET"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "important",
        "rule_info": "DS450002.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "xpaths": ["//system.web/trace/@enabled"],
                "pattern": "true",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ],
                "type": "regex"
            }
        ],
		"conditions" : [
            {
                "pattern" : {
                    "xpaths": ["//system.web/trace/@localOnly"],
                    "pattern": "true",
                    "type": "regex",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ]
                },
                "search_in": "same-file",
                "negate_finding": true
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "<system.web>\n<trace enabled='true' pageOutput='false' requestLimit='40' localOnly='false' />\n</system.web>"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
            "<system.web>\n<trace enabled='true' pageOutput='false' requestLimit='40' localOnly='true' />\n</system.web>"
        ]
    },
    {
        "name": "Web.config debug is enabled",
        "id": "DS450003",
        "description": "Having debug mode enabled is inefficient and could leak sensitive application information in production.",
        "recommendation": "Disable debug mode.",
        "applies_to_file_regex": [
            ".*\\.config$"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Framework.NET"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "manualreview",
        "rule_info": "DS450003.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "xpaths": ["//system.web/compilation/@debug"],
                "pattern": "true",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ],
                "type": "regex"
            }
        ],
        "fix_its": [
            {
                "name": "Set debug to false",
                "replacement": "false",
                "type": "RegexReplace",
                "pattern": {
                    "pattern": "true",
                    "type": "substring",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ],
                    "modifiers": ["i"]
                }
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "<system.web>\n<compilation debug='true' targetFramework='1.0' />\n</system.web>"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
            "<system.web>\n<compilation debug='false' targetFramework='1.0' />\n</system.web>"
        ]
    }   
]
```

## File: `rules/default/security/frameworks/php.json`
```json
[
  {
    "name": "$_REQUEST should be avoided",
    "id": "DS144886",
    "description": "$_REQUEST combines POST, GET, and cookie values in one array, making it easy for an attacker to modify a POST or cookie value by instead putting it in a GET and sending the URL to the victim",
    "recommendation": "Use $_POST, $_GET, $_COOKIE to scope to the expected delivery method for a value ",
    "applies_to": [
      "php"
    ],
    "tags": [
      "Implementation.PHP"
    ],
    "confidence": "high",
    "severity": "moderate",
    "rule_info": "DS144886.md",
    "patterns": [
      {
        "pattern": "\\$_REQUEST",
        "type": "regex",
        "scopes": [
          "code"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "fix_its": [
      {
        "name": "Change to $_GET",
        "type": "RegexReplace",
        "replacement": "$$_GET",
        "pattern": {
          "pattern": "\\$_REQUEST",
          "type": "regex",
          "scopes": [
            "code"
          ],
          "_comment": ""
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "Change to $_POST",
        "type": "RegexReplace",
        "replacement": "$$_POST",
        "pattern": {
          "pattern": "\\$_REQUEST",
          "type": "regex",
          "scopes": [
            "code"
          ],
          "_comment": ""
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "Change to $_COOKIE",
        "type": "RegexReplace",
        "replacement": "$$_COOKIE",
        "pattern": {
          "pattern": "\\$_REQUEST",
          "type": "regex",
          "scopes": [
            "code"
          ],
          "_comment": ""
        }
      }
    ],
    "must-match": [
      "$var = $_REQUEST[\"var\"]"
    ],
    "must-not-match": [
    ]
  },
  {
    "name": "XSS: Do not echo unencoded GET/POST/COOKIE values",
    "id": "DS163877",
    "description": "When using $_GET/POST/COOKIE values via echo, failure to  encode the values will lead to Cross Site Scripting (XSS), where a malicious party can inject script into the webpage.",
    "recommendation": "HTML Entity Encode (for content going into HTML) or URL Encode (for content going into JavaScript variables) the data",
    "applies_to": [
      "php"
    ],
    "tags": [
      "Implementation.PHP"
    ],
    "confidence": "high",
    "severity": "moderate",
    "rule_info": "DS163877.md",
    "patterns": [
      {
        "pattern": "\\becho.*(\\$_(POST|GET|REQUEST|COOKIE)\\[.*\\])",
        "type": "regex",
        "scopes": [
          "code"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "conditions": [
      {
        "pattern": {
          "pattern": "\\b(htmlentities|htmlspecialchars|rawurlencode|urlencode)\\s*\\(.*(\\$_(POST|GET|REQUEST|COOKIE)\\[.*\\]).*\\)",
          "type": "regex",
          "scopes": [
            "code"
          ],
          "_comment": ""
        },
        "search_in": "finding-only",
        "negate_finding": true
      }
    ],
    "fix_its": [
      {
        "name": "HTML Entity encode the data",
        "type": "RegexReplace",
        "replacement": "htmlentities($1)",
        "pattern": {
          "pattern": "(\\$_(POST|GET|REQUEST|COOKIE)\\[.*\\])",
          "type": "regex",
          "scopes": [
            "code"
          ],
          "_comment": ""
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "URL encode the data",
        "type": "RegexReplace",
        "replacement": "rawurlencode($1)",
        "pattern": {
          "pattern": "(\\$_(POST|GET|REQUEST|COOKIE)\\[.*\\])",
          "type": "regex",
          "scopes": [
            "code"
          ],
          "_comment": ""
        }
      }
    ],
    "must-match": [
      "echo($_POST[\"var\"]);"
    ],
    "must-not-match": [
    ]
  }
]
```

## File: `rules/default/security/manualreview/dynamiccode.json`
```json
[
    {
        "name": "Review eval for untrusted data",
        "id": "DS189424",
        "description": "If untrusted data (data from HTTP requests, user submitted files, etc.) is included in an eval statement it can allow an attacker to inject their own code.",
        "recommendation": "Edit the eval so that no untrusted data is included. If untrusted data is absolutely necessary a great deal of care should be taken to ensure it is properly escaped so that it cannot be executed. This is not as simple as just escaping quotes.",
        "applies_to": [
            "python",
            "javascript",
            "typescript",
            "php"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Python.DangerousFunctionCall",
            "JavaScript.DangerousFunctionCall",
            "TypeScript.DangerousFunctionCall",
            "PHP.DangerousFunctionCall"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "ManualReview",
        "rule_info": "DS189424.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "\\beval\\(([^,]+)\\)",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "c = eval(a+b)"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
        ]
    },
    {
        "name": "Review setTimeout for untrusted data",
        "id": "DS172411",
        "description": "If untrusted data (data from HTTP requests, user submitted files, etc.) is included in an setTimeout statement it can allow an attacker to inject their own code.",
        "recommendation": "Edit the setTimeout so that no untrusted data is included. If untrusted data is absolutely necessary a great deal of care should be taken to ensure it is properly escaped so that it cannot be executed. This is not as simple as just escaping quotes.",
        "applies_to": [
            "javascript",
            "typescript"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "JavaScript.DangerousFunctionCall",
            "TypeScript.DangerousFunctionCall"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "ManualReview",
        "rule_info": "DS172411.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "\\bsetTimeout\\(([^,]+)\\)",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "setTimeout(500);"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
        ]
    },
    {
        "name": "Review unsafe code",
        "id": "DS172412",
        "description": "The unsafe keyword denotes an unsafe context, which is required for any operation involving pointers. Unsafe code in is not necessarily dangerous; it is just code whose safety cannot be verified by the CLR.",
        "recommendation": "",
        "applies_to": [
            "csharp",
            "vb"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Dotnet.Unsafecode"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "ManualReview",
        "rule_info": "DS172412.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "unsafe",
                "type": "RegexWord",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "    unsafe static void Main()\n"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
        ]
    }
]
```

## File: `rules/default/security/manualreview/zip_slip.json`
```json
[
    {
        "name": "Do not extract untrusted zip archives",
        "id": "DS113854",
        "description": "Zip archive can contain file names with directory stepping sequence",
        "recommendation": "Make sure that ZipArchiveEntry.FullName doesn't directory stepping characters ..\\",
        "applies_to": [
            "csharp",
            "fsharp"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "DotNet.DangerousFunctionCall"
        ],
        "confidence": "medium",
        "severity": "ManualReview",
        "rule_info": "DS113854.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "ExtractToFile",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "conditions" : [
            {
                "pattern" : 
                {
                    "pattern": "ZipArchiveEntry",
                    "type": "regex",                    
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ]      
                },
                "search_in" : "finding-region(-15,0)",             
                "_comment": "" 
            }          
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "using (ZipArchive archive = ZipFile.OpenRead(zipPath))\n{\n    foreach (ZipArchiveEntry entry in archive.Entries)\n    {\n        if (entry.FullName.EndsWith(\".txt\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))\n        {\n            entry.ExtractToFile(Path.Combine(extractPath, entry.FullName));\n        }\n    }\n}"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
        ]
    }
]
```

## File: `rules/default/security/privacy/secrets.json`
```json
[
    {
        "name": "Do not store tokens or keys in source code.",
        "id": "DS173237",
        "description": "A token or key was found in source code. If this represents a secret, it should be moved somewhere else.",
        "recommendation": "",
        "tags": [
            "Implementation.Privacy.Token"
        ],
        "confidence": "medium",
        "severity": "important",
        "rule_info": "DS173237.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "[\"'][a-f0-9]{30,}[\"']",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "conditions": [
            {
                "pattern": {
                    "pattern": "[assembly: InternalsVisibleTo",
                    "type": "substring",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ]
                },
                "negate_finding": true,
                "search_in": "same-line"
            },
            {
                "pattern": {
                    "pattern": "<InternalsVisibleTo Include=",
                    "type": "substring",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ]
                },
                "negate_finding": true,
                "search_in": "same-line"
            },
            {
                "pattern": {
                    "pattern": "[\"']0+[\"']",
                    "type": "regex",
                    "scopes": ["code"]
                },
                "negate_finding": true,
                "search_in": "finding-only"
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "var hash = \"121212121212121212121212121212\""
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
            "[assembly: InternalsVisibleTo(\"Application.Tests, PublicKey=1234567890abcd\")]",
            "<InternalsVisibleTo Include=\"Application.Tests\" Key=\"1234567890abcd\"/>",
            "'0000000000000000000000000000000'"
        ]
    },
    {
        "name": "Do not store tokens or keys in source code.",
        "id": "DS117838",
        "description": "A token or key was found in source code. If this represents a secret, it should be moved somewhere else.",
        "recommendation": "",
        "overrides": [
            "DS173237"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Implementation.Privacy.Token"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "critical",
        "rule_info": "DS117838.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "(secret|license|key|pass).*[a-f0-9]{30,}",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "var key = '121212121212121212121212121212'"
        ],
        "must-not-match": []
    }
]
```

## File: `rules/default/security/storage/secure_storage.json`
```json
[
    {
        "name": "ProtectedData used without additional entropy",
        "id": "DS112266",
        "description": "The ProtectedData class should be used with additional entropy to reduce the risk of other application calling DPAPI to access the data.",
        "recommendation": "Add additional entropy (per-application secret).",
        "applies_to": [
            "csharp",
            "fsharp"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Storage.Windows.DPAPI"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "moderate",
        "rule_info": "DS112266.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "ProtectedData\\.Protect.*,\\s*null.*",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "fix_its": [
            {
                "name": "Add entropy placeholder",
                "type": "RegexReplace",
                "replacement": "$1<entropy>$2",
                "pattern": {
                    "pattern": "(ProtectedData\\.Protect[^,]+,\\s*)null(.*)",
                    "type": "regex",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ],
                    "_comment": ""
                }
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "ProtectedData.Protect(data ,null, DataProtectionScope.CurrentUser)"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
        ]
    },
    {
        "name": "Do not store sensitive data in NSUserDefaults.",
        "id": "DS191340",
        "description": "Do not store sensitive data in NSUserDefaults.",
        "recommendation": "Consider another mechanism instead.",
        "applies_to": [
            "objective-c"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Storage.Apple.iOS.UserDefaults.SensitiveData"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "moderate",
        "rule_info": "DS191340.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "NSUserDefaults \\*(.*) = \\[NSUserDefaults standardUserDefaults\\];(\\n.*){1,5}$1 .*setString:(password|key)",
                "type": "regex",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ]
    }
]
```

## File: `rules/default/security/xml/external_entities.json`
```json
[
    {
        "name": "Do not enable external entity resolution.",
        "id": "DS132779",
        "description": "Do not enable external entity resolution.",
        "recommendation": "Set shouldResolveExternalEntities to NO.",
        "applies_to": [
            "objective-c"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Implementation.iOS.XML.DTDEntityResolution"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "moderate",
        "rule_info": "DS132779.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "shouldResolveExternalEntities\\s*=\\s*YES",
                "type": "RegexWord",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "fix_its": [
            {
                "name": "Disable external entity resolution",
                "type": "RegexReplace",
                "replacement": "$1NO",
                "pattern": {
                    "pattern": "(shouldResolveExternalEntities\\s*=\\s*)(YES)",
                    "type": "regex",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ],
                    "_comment": ""
                }
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "foo.shouldResolveExternalEntities = YES ;",
            "bar.shouldResolveExternalEntities=YES;"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
            "foo.shouldResolveExternalEntities = NO ;",
            "bar.shouldResolveExternalEntities=NO;",
            "foo.shouldResolveExternalEntities = baz;"
        ]
    },
    {
        "name": "Do not enable external entity resolution.",
        "id": "DS132780",
        "description": "Do not enable external entity resolution.",
        "recommendation": "x.setShouldResolveExternalEntities = FALSE;",
        "applies_to": [
            "swift"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Implementation.iOS.XML.DTDEntityResolution"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "moderate",
        "rule_info": "DS132779.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "shouldResolveExternalEntities\\s*=\\s*TRUE",
                "type": "RegexWord",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "fix_its": [
            {
                "name": "Disable external entity resolution",
                "type": "RegexReplace",
                "replacement": "$1FALSE",
                "pattern": {
                    "pattern": "(shouldResolveExternalEntities\\s*=\\s*)(TRUE)",
                    "type": "regex",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ],
                    "_comment": ""
                }
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "shouldResolveExternalEntities=TRUE"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
        ]
    },
    {
        "name": "Do not enable external entity resolution.",
        "id": "DS132790",
        "description": "Do not enable external entity resolution.",
        "recommendation": "[x setShouldResolveExternalEntities: NO];",
        "applies_to": [
            "objective-c"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "Implementation.iOS.XML.DTDEntityResolution"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "moderate",
        "rule_info": "DS132779.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "setShouldResolveExternalEntities:\\s*YES",
                "type": "RegexWord",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
        "fix_its": [
            {
                "name": "Disable external entity resolution",
                "type": "RegexReplace",
                "replacement": "$1NO",
                "pattern": {
                    "pattern": "(setShouldResolveExternalEntities:\\s*)(YES)",
                    "type": "regex",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ],
                    "_comment": ""
                }
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "setShouldResolveExternalEntities: YES"
        ],
        "must-not-match": [
        ]
    }
]
```

## File: `rules/default/security/xml/xslt_scripting.json`
```json
[
    {
        "name": "XSLT Scripting Enabled",
        "id": "DS132781",
        "description": "XSLT Scripting is a feature that should only be enabled if script support is necessary and you are certain this is used in a trusted environment.",
        "recommendation": "Disable XSLT scripting.",
        "applies_to": [
            "CSharp"
        ],
        "tags": [
            "XSLT"
        ],
        "confidence": "high",
        "severity": "ManualReview",
        "rule_info": "DS132781.md",
        "patterns": [
            {
                "pattern": "EnableScript\\s*=\\s*(true|TRUE)",
                "type": "RegexWord",
                "scopes": [
                    "code"
                ]
            }
        ],
		"conditions" : [
            {
                "pattern" : 
                {
                    "pattern": "XsltSettings",
                    "type": "regex",
                    "scopes": [
                        "code"
                    ],
                    "_comment": "EnableScript is a property of XsltSettings."
                },
                "negate_finding": false,
                "search_in": "only-before"
            }
        ],
        "must-match": [
            "XsltSettings n = new XsltSettings();\n n.EnableScript=true",
			"XsltSettings n = new XsltSettings(){ EnableScript = true };",
			"var settings = new XsltSettings(){ EnableScript = true };",
			"XsltSettings n = new(){ EnableScript = true };"
        ],
		"must-not-match": [
            "CustomObject object = new CustomObject();\n object.EnableScript=true"
        ]
    }
]
```
